name: FAMILIAL ADENOMATOUS POLYPOSIS

demographics.Genetics: autosomal dominant disease with 80% penetrance; gene localized on chromosome 5;
demographics.Path: tubular / villotubular adenomatous polyps; usually about 1,000 adenomas

dominant_finding: "carpet of polyps" = myriad of 2-3 mm (up to 2 cm) polypoid lesions
discriminating_features: "carpet of polyps" = myriad of 2-3 mm (up to 2 cm) polypoid lesions

general: "carpet of polyps" = myriad of 2-3 mm (up to 2 cm) polypoid lesions

clinical.Cx: malignant transformation of adenomas: colon > stomach > small bowel in 12% [30%]
clinical.Rx: prophylactic total colectomy in late teens / early twenties before symptoms develop
